generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

network.title: Network error
network.message: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.

auth.title: Authentication error
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
auth.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.

validation.title: Validation error
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters with numbers and letters.

rateLimit.title: Too many requests
rateLimit.message: Please wait {{minutes}} minute(s) before trying again.
rateLimit.tryAgain: Too many attempts. Please slow down.

server.title: Server error
server.message: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
server.maintenance: We're under maintenance. We'll be back soon.

trip.title: Trip planning error
trip.generationFailed: Failed to generate trip plan. Please try again.
trip.noDestinations: No destinations available for the selected criteria.
trip.budgetTooLow: Budget is too low for the selected destination.

booking.title: Booking error
booking.notEligible: You are not eligible to make this booking.

file.title: File error
file.tooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {{max}}MB.
